a:r.a:t: Landscape Uses of Trees, Shrubs & Climbers
पेड़ों, झाड़ियों और लताओं के लैंडस्केप उपयोग
मिट्टी के कटाव को कम करना
Plant Layers in Landscape / लैंडस्केप में पौधों की परतें
Upper canopy for shade and structure
Middle layer for boundaries and screening
Vertical coverage for walls and pergolas
Explain how different plant types serve different functional purposes in landscape design. Trees provide structure and shade, shrubs create boundaries, and climbers add vertical interest.
